title: Dryopteris madagascariensis
taxonomy: Dryopteris madagascariensis belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae and is classified as a species of fern. It is a member of the genus Dryopteris, which consists of various species of wood ferns. The species is native to Madagascar, which suggests its specific classification as a species endemic to the island. The classification of Dryopteris madagascariensis is further supported by its unique characteristics and morphological features that distinguish it from other species within the genus. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary history and relationships between different species of ferns.
